name: ld-notion-hub
description: LD-Notion Hub — AI 多源知识中枢

scripts.test:legacy: node tests/utils.test.js && node tests/logic-modules.test.js && node tests/notion-oauth.test.js
scripts.verify:baseline: npm test && node --check LinuxDo-Bookmarks-to-Notion.user.js && node scripts/validate-userscript-ui.js
scripts.verify:extension:bounded: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const os=require('os'); const path=require('path'); const { buildExtension } = require('./scripts/build-extension.js'); const outDir=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'ld-notion-build-bounded-')); try { buildExtension({ manifestProfile: 'bounded_hosts', outDir }); } finally { fs.rmSync(outDir, { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
scripts.verify:delivery: npm run verify:baseline && npm run verify:extension:bounded && npm run verify:bridge-extension && npm run verify:extension:surfaces && npm run verify:equivalence && npm run build:extension
scripts.verify:build: node build.js && node --check dist/LinuxDo-Bookmarks-to-Notion.user.js && grep -q 'LD-NOTION-BUILD:USER_SCRIPT_BODY_START' dist/LinuxDo-Bookmarks-to-Notion.user.js && grep -q 'LD-NOTION-BUILD:BOOKMARK_BRIDGE_START' dist/LinuxDo-Bookmarks-to-Notion.user.js

author: Smith-106
